title: Use secure temporary file creation
description: Insecure temporary file creation methods can lead to race conditions, privilege escalation, and unauthorized access. Predictable file names or insecure permissions make temporary files vulnerable to attack.
recommendation: Use secure temporary file creation functions that generate unpredictable names and set appropriate permissions.

noncompliant.description: Using predictable file names, process IDs, or overly permissive file permissions creates security vulnerabilities.

compliant.description: Using secure temporary file creation functions that generate unpredictable names and set appropriate permissions.

checks.message: Use secure temporary file creation functions that generate unpredictable names and set appropriate permissions.
